hero.heading: Systems for ambitious software.
hero.sub: We design the brand and ship the software it runs on. Tokenized, versionable, regeneratable.

s01.title: Full-stack development.
s01.body: Web apps, APIs, and production infrastructure. Architecture to deploy, end-to-end.

s02.title: Product UI.
s02.body: Production-grade interfaces. Component libraries. Dashboards that ship.

s03.title: Bilingual project management.
s03.body: End-to-end delivery in English and Spanish. Cross-border coordination, async-first.

s04.title: Automation & AI.
s04.body: Internal tools, AI workflows, prompt systems, CI pipelines.

about.heading: Built around an axis.
about.pull_quote: Most agencies hand you a PDF. We hand you a repository.
about.body: We are a small team of designers and engineers building brand systems for ambitious companies. We work in repos, ship in weeks, and measure twice.
about.p01: We design the system and the software.
about.p02: Engineering-grade precision applied to brand work.
about.p04: Tooling as a deliverable: prompt libraries, generators, CI pipelines.
about.p05: AI-native production: every asset regeneratable from tokens and prompts.

pricing.hourly_qualifier: No commitment · Pay as you go
pricing.hourly_note_body: Book a block of hours. Start small, expand as the work grows. For founders who want to ship without a long-term retainer.

footer.legal: © 2026 — Axial Labs // Systems for ambitious software

not_found.heading: That route doesn't exist.
not_found.body: The wordmark isn't lost. It's just not here.
